sql.where:
A.groupIdx = B.idx and A.isDel = 0
AND A.id IN (613, 627, 588)
AND A.groupIdx = #{param.groupIdx}
and A.fcIdx = #{param.fcIdx}
and ( A.manager like '%${param.searchWord}%' or A.conManager like '%${param.searchWord}%')
and ${param.searchField} like '%${param.searchWord}%'
and date_format(A.createDate, '%Y-%m-%d') between #{param.startDate} and #{param.endDate}
and exists (select 1 from TB_MEMO m where m.constructionIdx = A.id)
and exists (select 1 from TB_CONTRACT c where c.CONSTRUCTION_IDX = A.id and c.isDel = 0) and IFNULL((SELECT CASE WHEN C.STATUS = 'SIGNED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM TB_CONTRACT C WHERE C.CONSTRUCTION_IDX = A.id AND C.isDel = 0 ORDER BY C.CONTRACT_IDX DESC LIMIT 1), 0) = 0
and IFNULL((SELECT CASE WHEN C.STATUS = 'SIGNED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM TB_CONTRACT C WHERE C.CONSTRUCTION_IDX = A.id AND C.isDel = 0 ORDER BY C.CONTRACT_IDX DESC LIMIT 1), 0) = 1
and exists (select 1 from TB_CONTRACT c where c.CONSTRUCTION_IDX = A.id and c.isDel = 0)
and exists (select 1 from TB_CONSTRUCTION_BLOCK b where b.constructionIdx = A.id and b.blockedYn = 1)
and A.conduct = 0
and A.conduct = 1
and A.id = #{param.constructionIdx}

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_CONSTRUCTION A, TB_GROUP B
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_CONSTRUCTION A, TB_GROUP B

SELECT A.id , A.name , A.password , A.manager , A.contact , A.conManager , A.conContact , date_format(A.createDate, '%Y-%m-%d') as createDate , A.location , A.role , A.userId , A.address , A.isDel , A.groupIdx , A.secretCode , A.conduct , A.fcIdx , A.longCalYn , A.ubcYn , A.originDataYn , A.showPdfYn , IFNULL((SELECT blockedYn FROM TB_CONSTRUCTION_BLOCK WHERE constructionIdx = A.id), 0) AS blockedYn , IFNULL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_CONTRACT WHERE CONSTRUCTION_IDX = A.id AND isDel = 0), 0) AS contractCount , IFNULL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_CONSTRUCTION_SETTING_CONFIG c WHERE A.createDate >= c.APPLY_FROM_DATE), 0) AS settingRequired , IFNULL(( SELECT CASE WHEN C.STATUS = 'SIGNED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM TB_CONTRACT C WHERE C.CONSTRUCTION_IDX = A.id AND C.isDel = 0 ORDER BY C.CONTRACT_IDX DESC LIMIT 1 ), 0) AS latestContractSignedYn , B.groupName FROM TB_CONSTRUCTION A, TB_GROUP B
ORDER BY (case when A.id = 1482 then 10000 else (case when A.id = 587 then 9999 else 0 end) end ) desc , A.conduct ASC, A.id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{startRow}

SELECT A.id , A.name , A.manager , A.password , A.contact , A.conManager , A.conContact , date_format(A.createDate, '%Y-%m-%d') as createDate , A.location , A.role , A.userId , A.address , A.isDel , A.groupIdx , A.secretCode , A.conduct , A.fcIdx , A.longCalYn , A.ubcYn , A.originDataYn , A.showPdfYn FROM TB_CONSTRUCTION A, TB_GROUP B
ORDER BY (case when A.id = 1482 then 10000 else (case when A.id = 587 then 9999 else 0 end) end ) desc , A.conduct ASC, A.id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{startRow}
